message:
refactor: apply clippy lints and add E2E debugging workflow test

Systematic clippy/rustfmt cleanup of the CLI and tracing modules:

- Add #![allow(clippy::result_large_err)] to CLI binary to acknowledge
  intentionally rich CliError type
- Replace .map().unwrap_or_else() with .map_or_else() for idiomatic
  Option handling in trace event formatting (asupersync.rs)
- Change io_error() parameter from owned to borrowed (&io::Error) since
  the function only reads from the error, avoiding unnecessary moves
- Deduplicate OutputFormat::Json and StreamJson match arms
- Replace floating-point byte formatting with integer arithmetic to avoid
  precision loss (format_bytes/format_scaled)
- Extract metadata fields before moving reader to satisfy borrow checker
  more explicitly (trace_info)
- Use i128::from() instead of as-cast for timestamp conversion
- Replace format! in println! with inline format args
- Add #[allow(clippy::cast_precision_loss)] where justified
- Fix trailing semicolons in benchmark closures

New test coverage:
- Add e2e_debugging_workflow_record_save_load_step integration test that
  exercises the full record → persist → load → step → seek → breakpoint
  debugging workflow end-to-end

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
